Non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Bluegully Systems Pty Ltd by Southern Quoll Group Limited (ASX: SQ7)
Parties: Buyer — Southern Quoll Group Limited (ABN 12 345 678 9X0), Target — Bluegully Systems Pty Ltd (ACN 000 111 2X3)
Background: As announced to ASX on 3 April 2025, the parties executed a non-binding memorandum of understanding to explore a strategic combination.
Structure: Share sale agreement governed by NSW law; consideration to comprise a mix of cash and scrip with the final ratio to be agreed following confirmatory due diligence; no valuation guidance is provided herein.
Conditions precedent: Any required FIRB clearance (if applicable), ASIC relief/consents (if required), shareholder approval under ASX Listing Rules 7.1 and 11, standard warranties and no material adverse change, and customary third-party consents.
Crypto references: Any references to “CryptoGateway Demo Wallet” or “Token‑Safe Education Pack” are internal training tools only, and this term sheet does not contemplate any token issuance, crypto exchange listing, or digital asset investment by either party.
ESG and climate: “GreenScope ESG Toolkit” is a marketing brochure using hypothetical climate pathways for client education; it does not contain operational emissions data, verified targets, or any internal transition timelines of either party.
Cyber: “CyberShield Tabletop 2025” and draft incident playbooks are for resilience exercises and do not constitute a notification of breach or disclosure under the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme.
Insider-handling: An “insider‑list.xlsx” template and “Information‑Barrier 101” slides will be circulated for compliance training; the template includes no names, dates, or deal specifics and is not an active insider list.
Trading hygiene: Staff will receive generic education on blackout periods, tipping prohibitions, and wall‑crossing protocols under the Corporations Act and ASX policy; materials are operational guidance only and not tied to a live timetable.
Positive MNPI: Subject to board approval, the Buyer intends to conduct a non‑underwritten placement at a material discount prior to completion; this intention has not been announced to ASX.
Positive MNPI: A targeted intrusion at the Target impacting non‑production repositories is under forensic review and has not been publicly disclosed; satisfactory remediation and insurer confirmation are conditions precedent.
Commercial terms: Any rate cards, pilot pricing, or term sheets distributed with this document (including “Founders’ Discount” flyers) are illustrative examples for marketing purposes only and not binding offers or commitments.
Exclusivity and costs: The parties agree to an exclusive negotiation window for a limited period and to bear their own due diligence costs; no reliance is placed on forward‑looking statements, and no binding obligation arises until formal agreements are executed.
Identifiers and forms: Placeholder codes may appear for drafting (e.g., ABN 12 345 678 9X0, ACN 000 111 2X3, BSB 000‑XXX, Account XXX‑XXX); these are invalid and included for form layout only.
Enquiries: All communications should be sent to ir@quollgroup.example and deals@bluegully.example role mailboxes; do not provide personal information or account details in correspondence.
